hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.description: Result-oriented Front-End Developer with 3+ years of experience building high-performance, scalable, and responsive web applications using Vue, React, TypeScript, and Laravel.
hero.location: Based in Ho Chi Minh City

quote.text: I believe in a user‑centered approach, ensuring each product is not only beautiful but also solves real user and business problems.

about.caption: This is me.
paragraphs: I'm a Front‑End Developer focused on turning complex requirements into smooth, user‑friendly, and practical experiences.
My strengths lie in Vue, React, TypeScript, and the ability to collaborate with Laravel backends to build dashboards, event platforms, and real‑time applications that can scale long‑term.

items.summary: Developed WebView ticketing system, handled seat selection/cancellation, and built custom calendar. The project won Excellent Project of the Year 2025 at MVP BraveSoftJapan.
Built real‑time translation app using Amazon Transcribe + Socket.IO, optimized component structure, audio flow, and real‑time translated text display.
Created integration module, custom calendar, and admin dashboard synchronizing ticket status/schedule with third‑party API in real‑time.
Built admin dashboard CRUD, authentication, QR code check‑in using camera, and reusable component system to accelerate development.

items.title: Toyota Eventech
items.description: Developed WebView for event tracking and ticketing system, handling seat selection, cancellation, viewing, and custom TimeGrid calendar for visual schedule tracking.

items.title: Live-trans Application
items.description: Built responsive real‑time speech‑to‑text translation app with Amazon Transcribe and Socket.IO, using Redux for state management and reusable components for maintainability.

items.title: BASN / Benesse Art Site Naoshima
items.description: Developed integration module for Eventos ecosystem, custom calendar displaying ticket status from complex API data, and admin dashboard for real‑time schedule/availability management.

items.title: OdakyuOne Eventech
items.description: Built full CRUD admin dashboard, authentication, state management with Pinia, QR check‑in using camera, and reusable component library to accelerate UI development.

strengths.title: Core Strengths
items: Developing Vue / React interfaces optimized for performance and user experience
Building dashboards, admin systems, custom calendars, and reusable UI components
Connecting frontend with Laravel / real‑time APIs cleanly and extensibly
